programme.title: Undercover Underage
programme.desc: (MA) In order to get more information out of an adult contacting underage persona Flori, the team creates an of-age persona. Meanwhile, an older man reaches out to a new persona, Alex.

programme.title: Quiet On Set: The Dark Side Of Kids Tv
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Quiet On Set: The Dark Side Of Kids Tv
programme.desc: (M) Dan Schneider's relationship with his star Amanda Bynes hits a breaking point as new child actors confront uncomfortable scenes and power dynamics.
